name: Cell Observer — cells (standard filename)
description: Cell Observer cells-mode batch with the FULL naming convention: folders <researcher>/<cell_line>/<experiment>/ and filenames <cell_line>_<experiment>_<magnification>_<condition>_<image_num>.czi (5 underscore chunks). Mirrors tools/configs/cell_observer_itziar_alphasma_TEST.yaml (round 5). This is the Cell Observer template default — pick it, point at the CELL OBSERVER root (the folder above <researcher>), preview, then ingest. If your filenames carry ONLY <condition>_<image_num> (the rest living in the folders), use the 'abbreviated filename' recipe instead.
